prerequisites.value: Con 13 or Wis 13, Enhanced Morale 1, Exotic Weapon Proficiency ( dueling sword ), Iron Will, base attack bonus +4.

description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever an effect would grant you an enhancement or morale bonus to your Strength score (such as via bull’s strength or a skald’s inspired rage performance), you can instead apply that bonus to your Dexterity score. You make this choice when you first gain the bonus. The bonus type does not change. 1 Details for this were not available in the source material.
